options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: RandomizeContainers
options.description: Randomize items found in chests, bloom pods, and other containers.

options.name: RandomizeShops
options.description: Randomize items sold in shops. (Not yet implemented)

options.name: RandomizeBrushes
options.description: Randomize brush technique acquisitions from constellations.

options.name: ShopSlots
options.description: Number of item slots available in each randomized shop.

options.name: NightTimeChecksRequireCrescent
options.description:
Makes all nighttime checks logically require Crescent.

Currently included:
- All buried chests except the ones under leaf piles
- Bakigami
- Hayabusa

options.name: KarmicTransformers
options.description:
Karmic Transformers are Cosmetic items that changes Amaterasu's appearance:

Excluded: Won't appear
Precollected: You'll start with them already collected
In item pool: They will be placed in item pool. You'll start with the Karmic Returner

options.name: OpenGameStart
options.display_name: Remove some events for a more open start
options.description:
NOT IMPLEMENTED IN CLIENT YET - USE AT YOUR OWN RISK !!
Remove some early events for a more open game start:
    - Restoring the river of the Heavens
    - Cutting the peach containing the villagers in Kamiki
    - Restoring Kamiki Village with Sunrise
    - Fixing Kushi's Water Mill
    - Waking Up Susano
    - Saving the Merchant in Kamiki
    - Opening the boulder to Shinshu field
    - Mr. Orange fight after restoring Kamiki Villagers

options.name: ProgressiveWeapons
options.description: With this option you'll find progressive weapons for each type instead of every weapon being in the item pool.

options.name: RemoveBlockHead
options.description:
NOT IMPLEMENTED IN CLIENT YET - USE AT YOUR OWN RISK !!
Removes all 3 instances of Blockhead

options.name: BloomGuardianSaplings
options.description:
NOT IMPLEMENTED IN CLIENT YET - USE AT YOUR OWN RISK !!
Bloom every guardian sapling except Kamiki Village and Hana Valley

options.name: RequiredDoggorbs
options.display_name: Number of Required Satomi Power Orbs to open Gale Shrine
options.description: Number of Required Canine Warriors/Orbs to open Gale Shrine - Not yet implemented

options.name: CanineRewards
options.display_name: Rewards given by the 8 Canine Warriors checks
options.description:
Rewards given by the 8 Canine Warriors checks:

Vanilla: Won't randomise their quest rewards.
Randomized: they will give random rewards, orbs will be placed in the item pool. - Not yet implemented
Junk: They won't give anything useful,orbs will be placed in the item pool. - Not yet implemented

options.name: MoonCaveAccess
options.display_name: What does trigger access to moon cave ?
options.description:
What does trigger access to moon cave ?

Serpent Crystal: You need to find the Serpent Crystal item to open Moon cave - Not yet Implemented
Crimson Helm: You need to defeat Crimson Helm to open moon cave.
Open: Moon Cave is open from start - Not yet Implemented

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
